programme.title: Bhoot
programme.desc: A married couple rents a beautiful, spacious apartment at a ridiculously cheap price only to find out that it is haunted. What follows is a series of eerie and hair-raising supernatural episodes in the house.

programme.title: 8 X 10 Tasveer
programme.desc: Jai, a uniquely gifted man, can see the past by simply looking at photographs. When his father mysteriously dies in a boating accident, he is determined to solve the mystery behind his sudden death and find the murderer.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Ghaatak Returns
programme.desc: Gautham doesn't believe in flirting but his friend Kannan is a compulsive flirt. Gautham finally falls in love with Sandhya, Kannan's cousin and the girl Kannan's parents want him to marry.

programme.title: Captain
programme.desc: V P Sathyan, a professional Indian footballer, goes through various ups and downs in his career as he strives hard to fulfil his ambitions.

programme.title: Masters
programme.desc: Milan Paul, a reporter, and Sriramakrishnan, a police officer, are best friends who always help each other. When they investigate a series of suicide-murders, they discover some shocking truths.

programme.title: Daring Rakhwala
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Guardians
programme.desc: Twilight Cove, a small forgotten town, is besieged by hideous creatures summoned into our dimension. It's only a matter of time before the army of creatures attacks the rest of civilization and wreaks havoc upon the world. At dusk, a beat-up truck containing a rag-tag team of hardened mercenaries rolls into town, and this is not the first time they've been called in to exterminate they are part of a secret society that has been operating outside of the government and the public eye for thousands of years. Their mission is to keep our world safe from evil-of our own creation and from beyond.

programme.title: The Lease
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: Sizwe Biko, an ordinary man with extraordinary skills as a martial artist. He wants nothing more than to live a simple life, but is thrust into a fight for his father's freedom, a leftover casualty of South Africa's former Apartheid mandates.

programme.title: How To Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage therapist attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: The Black Knight Returns
programme.desc: As an evil force rises to threaten the city, a young man returns home to take over The Black Knight legacy.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Local track star "Flash" Gordon learns that his scientist father disappeared through a trans-dimensional rift.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: Shaken by Claudia's revelation, J.T. attempts to run a secret ballistics test on the gun she carries.

programme.title: Fallout
programme.desc: This action thriller is set on Earth's new space station, Skyhook.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: Shaken by Claudia's revelation, J.T. attempts to run a secret ballistics test on the gun she carries.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Local track star "Flash" Gordon learns that his scientist father disappeared through a trans-dimensional rift.

programme.title: Derailed
programme.desc: Four teenagers running away from home get more than they bargained for when they lure a man to a motel to rob him.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: In The Cage
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black & white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Preying for Mercy
programme.desc: As he contends with an efficient and ruthless hit man sent after his family, Frank enlists the aid of his partners to put a stop to the on-coming assault. As the hit man zeros in and Frank is running out of time, he makes the only move he has left? the go on the run again, this time to secure the one secret he has left that could turn the tables around and turn him from the hunted to the hunter. James and Genie an estranged couple must go all the way to Vegas to rekindle a lost sparkle in their LAPD Detective Frank Gates is a hard working cop, a loving father and husband, and an all around good man. But beneath his gleaming veneer of happiness and stability lay a buried past wrought with secrets and violence.After letting a bust go bad in New York he fled for his life and changed his identity. Now, nearly 15 years later, his past has caught up with him and the truths he worked so hard to hide are clawing their way to the surface.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Movie Maitnee-Buhe Baariyan
programme.desc: Starcast-Neeru Bajwa, Nirmal Rishi, Rubina Bajwa, Jatinder Kaur, Simran Chahal, Seema Kaushal and Rupinder Rupi

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: The latest news, analysis and interviews covering the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance.

programme.title: Here's the Deal with Kellyanne
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Bruin Capital founder and CEO George Pyne about how he got started in sports, his role as an operator and his philosophy on sports investment. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation. (S1 E01)

programme.title: How India's Narendra Modi Took Power
programme.desc: Narendra Modi, India's prime minister, is both highly popular and deeply polarizing a look at how he gets to the top of Indian politics, and what his policies mean for the country's future. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets some of the world's most advanced, and most intelligent robots and questions whether the creation of a synthetic species with human-like intelligence improves the human experience or ends it.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: Emily Chang explores the future of connections with the machines and the technologies powering a growing market of relationships-on-demand.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: From brain implants that allow paralyzed patients to communicate to the wearable devices enhancing human capabilities, brain-computer interfaces could change the way people use their minds forever.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology exploring the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how people die.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Powerful stories, revealing conversations and animated explainers to help make sense of today's economic climate. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Jamai Raja
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is a tale of Siddharth Khurana (Sid), an hotelier, who falls in love with Roshni, a social worker. Sidhharth marries Roshni and lives with his in-laws. Siddharth, despite being an owner of a 7-star hotel, gives up his high-class

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Naagin Vaadon Ki Agnipariksha
programme.desc: Naaginn is a Hindi supernatural drama television series starring Khushi Dubey, Sayantani Ghosh and Manav Gohil. The story revolves around a serpent, Amrita, who transforms into a woman to avenge the death of her parents

programme.title: Santoshi Maa
programme.desc: Santoshi Maa is a Hindi spiritual drama television series starring Gracy Singh, Ratan Rajput and Ayaz Ahmed. The story revolves around Santoshi, a kind-hearted devotee of Goddess Santoshi Maa

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Mrs.Kaushik Ki Paanch Bahuyein
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Kaushik have five sons, all of whom are married and well settled. However, their journey gets intriguing as they welcome five daughters-in-law, all from different cultural backgrounds.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 03
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure 2 Ep 04
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 03
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 04
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 03
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 04
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 02
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 03

Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 04
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 03
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 04
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 02
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Umeed India
programme.desc: If you'd imagine an ace cricketer to host a television show, you can be sure it will be a sports related series. And, Umeed India makes a compelling case. For the first time, versatile cricketer Virender Sehwag will host a television show. Umeed India will showcase groundbreaking stories of diversified, intrepid athletes aiming for glory at Olympics 2020. For the 13-part series, Virender reinstates the fact that Olympic stars never ‘just' appear at the Games. Their stories start in small villages, where they train every day – with one aim in mind – bringing home that Gold. Watch Virender travel to their training bases, chronicling exciting moments in the home environment besides interviewing the athletes' families and coaching staff. The episodes feature inspiring stories of OP Karhana, Suyash Yadav, Avtar Singh and Dutee Chand along with Sakshi Malik, Vinesh Poghat among many other Olympians. Can we find the 2020 medalists for India in 2017?

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas-Break Free
I Am Too Sexy For My Shoes
Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan embarks on a two wheeled journey over the highest roads in the world, stopping in remote monasteries to learn the secrets of Buddhism's warrior demons and track down a secreted manuscript rumored to explain the lost years of Jesus.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: 60 nautical miles + 200kg of Burley divided by 3 keen spearos = mayhem. The team go wide this week, overnighting aboard The Orca in 1000m of water in the Far North, in an attempt to create a 24-hour trail capable of attracting in who knows what!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: We return to Fiordland in the hope of going one step better in slotting a hapuka on a spear, but the presence of Bluefin Tuna off the coast, and Wapiti Bulls on the slip faces proves a tempting distraction from the task at hand!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: Following a ridiculous sequence of events in Fiordland, the team saddle up and head for the hapuka haven of the Chatham Islands, where they spend a few days diving the spectacular & remote Pitt Island.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: After hearing reports of massive schools of southern bluefin tuna out of Milford Sound, Tim, Jordy, Kieran, Sam and Dave saddle up and try their luck, but a gear malfunction right in the heat of the moment threatens to seriously burst their bubble.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: There's nothing quite like a destination that knows how to embrace the cold. Samantha loves winter, and she's always looking for places that love it just as much. Join her as she explores the many reasons why Madison, Wisconsin is a Place to Love. (S1 E09)

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Dallas
programme.desc: When was the last time you visited Dallas? Probably on a work trip, or from the comfort of your couch. Dallas is a destination synonymous with sheer bigness. However, there's a lot of small, personal and unique things happening in Dallas. From charming neighborhoods, to unexpected green space and an incredible art scene, Dallas, Texas is a place to love.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his family begin their adventurous coast-to-coast road trip with stops in California, Nevada and Arizona. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his family continue their road trip in Flagstaff, AZ, where they hit the farmer's market and fly across the Grand Canyon before hitting Route 66 to check out Albuquerque, NM. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip
programme.desc: The Fieris' road trip goes through Texas where the family tours the Alamo and enjoys a meal prepared by chef Robert Irvine in honor of the troops before skydiving with members of the special forces. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip
programme.desc: The Fieri's continue their road trip with a stop in Corpus Christi, TX, where they search for snapper in the Gulf for a fish fry before hooking up with Chef Aaron Sanchez in New Orleans. (S1 E04)

programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.
